name: JumpCloud Directory Platform API
what_it_does: Cloud-based directory and identity platform with REST API — providing centralized user and device management, SSO for cloud apps, LDAP and RADIUS services, MDM for endpoints, and zero-trust access control without requiring on-premises Active Directory infrastructure.
use_cases: Provisioning and deprovisioning users across cloud services via JumpCloud API
Managing device enrollment and MDM policies for macOS, Windows, and Linux
Querying user directory for SCIM provisioning integration with SaaS apps
Automating group membership updates for role-based access control
Integrating JumpCloud events with SIEM for user access audit logging
not_for: Large enterprises with existing Microsoft Active Directory (use Azure AD/Entra)
Organizations requiring FIPS 140-2 hardware-based identity (use hardware HSMs)
Consumer identity and authentication (JumpCloud is workforce/B2E only)
best_when: A mid-market or SMB tech company wants to replace or avoid on-premises Active Directory with a cloud-native directory that manages users, devices (macOS/Linux/Windows), and SSO without Microsoft dependency.
avoid_when: You're deeply invested in Microsoft ecosystem (use Azure AD), need consumer identity (use Auth0/Okta), or have >5,000 users with complex enterprise requirements.

auth.notes: API key from JumpCloud admin console. Passed as x-api-key header. Organization ID (x-org-id) required for multi-tenant MSP access. No OAuth2. Separate v1 and v2 API versions with different endpoint paths. Webhook for directory events (user create, device enroll, etc.).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free for up to 10 users and 10 devices
pricing.paid_tiers: Device Management $9/device/month; SSO $11/user/month; Platform $19/user/month; Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Louisville, CO-based company. Founded 2012. Raised $400M+. 200,000+ organizations. Zero-trust and device-centric identity positioning. Strong in tech companies with mixed OS environments. MSP-friendly with multi-tenant API support. Free tier genuinely useful for small teams. PowerShell, Bash, and Python SDKs.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API v1 and v2 for users, systems, groups, policies, and events. x-api-key header auth. Good documentation with separate v1 and v2 references. x-org-id required for MSP multi-tenant. SCIM endpoint for automated provisioning from IdP. Python/JS/Go SDKs available. Rate limits documented (100 req/10s).
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User reads fully idempotent. Device reads idempotent. Group membership reads idempotent. User creation idempotent by email. Device enrollment not idempotent — check before enrolling.
known_agent_gotchas: V1 and V2 APIs have different URL paths and object models — specify version explicitly
x-org-id header required for MSP/multi-tenant access — omit for single-org
SCIM provisioning is separate endpoint from main REST API
Device MDM commands are asynchronous — status polling required
Rate limit is 100 requests per 10 seconds — implement token bucket logic

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2, ISO27001, FedRAMP compliant. GDPR compliant. US and EU data residency. API key via x-api-key header. Directory data is highest sensitivity — implement strict key rotation. FedRAMP In Process for US government. JumpCloud itself is a zero-trust identity provider — holds your identity infrastructure.
